title: Jakoman and Tetsu
writer: Keizo Kajino, Akira Kurosawa, Senkichi Taniguchi
actors: Toshirô Mifune, Ryûnosuke Tsukigata, Yuriko Hamada
plot: In a village subsisting on it herring fishery, a one-eyed criminal named Jakoman terrorizes the inhabitants. One of them, the son of the head of one of the fish companies by the name of Tetsu, decides to overthrow Jakoman and his ...
